query: SELECT id, name, email, role, authMethod, openId, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_password' ELSE 'no_password' END as pwStatus, lastSignedIn FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Ryan%' OR email LIKE '%ryan%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT id, name, email, role, authMethod, openId, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_password' ELSE 'no_password' END as pwStatus, lastSignedIn FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Ryan%' OR email LIKE '%ryan%' LIMIT 5;
